subject: Collaboration "{handle}" & STYLEWE
content:
Hi there,

Congratulations on your social media success so far! We're the Stylewe team and we strive to provide affordable fashion through our online shopping platform.

We're looking for collaboration on Instagram with creative influencers for our new project. We are impressed by your Instagram page, which aligns well with what we are looking for. We'd like to send you some free products in exchange for some featured posts on your Instagram. If you’d like to go over the collaboration details, please reply to this email.

Learn more about Stylewe:
Website: http://www.stylewe.com/
Instagram: @stylewe https://www.instagram.com/stylewe/

Kind regards
confidentialityText: The content of this email is confidential and intended for the recipient specified in message only. It is strictly forbidden to share any part of this message with any third party, without a written consent of the sender. If you received this message by mistake, please reply to this message and follow with its deletion, so that we can ensure such a mistake does not occur in the future.
companyTagline: An online multi-designer brand featuring independent fashion designers.
